title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition
summary: The round of layoffs was part of Polygon transitioning operations to payments following a $250 million deal to acquire Coinme and Sequence in January.

title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

title: Intuitive Surgical Drops as ACA Changes, GLP-1s Weigh on Growth
summary: Intuitive Surgical shares fell as much as 13% in after-market trading as growth in use of its da Vinci surgical robots slowed to the weakest pace in four years and its guidance for procedure growth was unchanged.

title: Bank Rally Hits Short Sellers Betting on Australia Lending Slump
summary: The upward march in share prices of Australia’s biggest banks is reversing the tumble sparked two months ago by property tax changes, and inflicting pain on short sellers who were anticipating a prolonged plunge.

title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI
summary: Source code leaked reveals how substantial portions of Suno’s training library were assembled.

title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
summary: Eligible customers can now buy, sell, and hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana with Morgan Stanley via Zero Hash.

title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left
summary: MegaETH did not take equity or governance positions in the approximately 20 projects incubated in the Mega Mafia.

title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.

title: US chip and memory stocks slide in fresh bout of Wall Street tumult
summary: Investors pull away from shares in companies that have led markets higher this year

title: Chinese AI start-up Moonshot to launch model challenging Anthropic’s lead
summary: Kimi K3 expected to exceed performance of Claude Opus 4.8 in sign of narrowing gap between US and China on frontier AI
